mapper.select:
/* 팀 배정 완료된 팀 분류 목록 TeamCtgrDAO.listComplateTeamByCrsCreCd */
WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID, USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE AUDITYN = 'N' AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' ), CMPTNY_TEAM_GRP AS ( SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM GROUP BY LRN_GRP_ID HAVING MIN(TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN) = 'Y' AND MAX(TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN) = 'Y' ) SELECT TEAM_GRP.LRN_GRP_ID , TEAM_GRP.LRN_GRPNM , TEAM_GRP.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP TEAM_GRP WHERE TEAM_GRP.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND TEAM_GRP.DELYN = 'N' AND TEAM_GRP.USEYN = 'Y' AND (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM SBJCT_USER WHERE SBJCT_ID = TEAM_GRP.SBJCT_ID) = (SELECT COUNT(TEAM_MBR.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM TEAM ON TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID = TEAM.TEAM_ID WHERE TEAM.LRN_GRP_ID = TEAM_GRP.LRN_GRP_ID) AND TEAM_GRP.LRN_GRP_ID IN (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM CMPTNY_TEAM_GRP)

/* 팀분류 조회 TeamCtgrDAO.teamListDiv */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TEAM_TYCD) AS LINE_NO , TEAM_TYCD , TEAM_CTGRNM , (SELECT COUNT(TEAM_ID) FROM TEAM WHERE TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD ) AS TEAM_CNT , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , FRST_INQ_DTTM , TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT B WHERE B.TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD AND DELYN = 'N') AS ASMNT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS B WHERE B.TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD AND DELYN = 'N') AS forum_cnt FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR A WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
AND ( TEAM_CTGRNM LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )
/* 팀 토론의 팀 리스트 TeamCtgrDAO.teamList */ SELECT TEAM_TYCD AS teamCtgrCd , TEAM_ID AS teamCd , TEAMNM AS teamNm FROM TEAM WHERE TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}

/* 팀 구성된 총 인원 TeamCtgrDAO.totalTeamMember */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR A LEFT JOIN TEAM B ON A.TEAM_TYCD = B.TEAM_TYCD LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR C ON B.TEAM_ID = C.TEAM_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}

/* 팀분류 사용 개수 TeamCtgrDAO.teamCtgrUseCnt */ SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT B WHERE B.TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD AND DELYN = 'N') AS ASMNT_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS B WHERE B.TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD AND DELYN = 'N') AS FORUM_CNT FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR A WHERE A.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}
